task_description: Fix prayer schedule card layout overlap across all 80+ layouts. In landscape/short viewports, prayer cards and other elements overlap because row-fixed sections cannot shrink. The fix makes row-fixed shrinkable via CSS flex-shrink and adds JS-based vertical overflow detection with scale transform to keep content visible and non-overlapping.

verification.summary: CSS and JS changes verified structurally. flex:0 1 auto applied to .row-fixed, no height:100% on .flex-layout, no max-height on row-fixed. autoFitVerticalOverflow function added and integrated at all required call sites. Media query for short viewports scoped to section.row-fixed only (review fix). Resize handlers properly debounced with clearTimeout pattern (review fix). Scale transform now sets explicit height to reclaim flex space (review fix). No automated tests exist for web assets - this is a WebView display app with visual verification only.
